title: negundo aceroides subsp. interior
intro: Negundo aceroides subsp. interior, also known as horse elder, is a shrub-like plant native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Negundo aceroides subsp. interior include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Negundo aceroides subsp. interior is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
